name: acceptance-gate
description: Acceptance gate for AI-generated features. Normalizes requirements into acceptance contracts, generates eval cases, renders decision cards and evidence pages, verifies evidence, and enforces evidence-backed verdicts with runtime hooks when available plus CI re-checks.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-backed acceptance gate for AI-generated features
interface.longDescription: Use Acceptance Gate to turn feature requests into acceptance contracts, generate evals, render decision cards and evidence pages, verify machine evidence, and block unsupported PASS verdicts with runtime hooks when available plus CI re-checks.
defaultPrompt: Create an acceptance contract and evals for this feature.
Verify this feature with evidence-backed acceptance gates.
